query:
DELETE FROM one_time_keys
            WHERE id = (
                SELECT id FROM one_time_keys
                WHERE user_id = $1
                  AND device_id = $2
                  AND is_fallback = false
                ORDER BY created_at
                LIMIT 1
                FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
            )
            RETURNING
                id,
                user_id,
                device_id,
                key_id,
                public_key,
                is_fallback,
                created_at
